results.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number.

test_cases.title: Create a new customer record with valid data
test_cases.objective: Verify that a new customer record can be created with valid name, email, and phone number.

steps.action: Click on the 'Create New Customer' button
steps.expected_result: The system navigates to the customer creation page

steps.action: Enter valid name, email, and phone number
steps.expected_result: The system creates a new customer record

test_cases.expected_result: A new customer record is created with valid data
source_basis: The system shall allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number.

warnings: TC_REQ_1_002: The test case invents unsupported behavior, such as exact error messages.

plans.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number.

coverage_items.rationale: To ensure the system can handle valid customer data.
source_basis: The system shall allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number.

results.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to search orders by order number.

test_cases.title: Search orders by order number - Positive
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system allows a user to search orders by order number.

steps.action: Enter a valid order number in the search field
steps.expected_result: The system displays the search results for the entered order number

steps.action: Enter an invalid order number in the search field
steps.expected_result: The system displays an error message indicating that the order number is invalid

test_cases.expected_result: The system allows a user to search orders by order number.
source_basis: The system shall allow a user to search orders by order number.

warnings: TC_REQ_1_002: The test case invents unsupported behavior, such as an error message for a very long order number.

plans.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to search orders by order number.

coverage_items.rationale: To ensure the search functionality is working correctly.
source_basis: The system shall allow a user to search orders by order number.

results.requirement_text: The system shall allow a manager to assign an employee to a department.

test_cases.title: Assign employee to department
test_cases.objective: Verify that a manager can assign an employee to a department.
preconditions: Employee is not assigned to a department

steps.action: Log in as a manager
steps.expected_result: Manager is logged in successfully

steps.action: Select an employee not assigned to a department
steps.expected_result: Employee is selected successfully

steps.action: Assign the selected employee to a department
steps.expected_result: Employee is assigned to the department successfully

test_cases.expected_result: Employee is assigned to the department successfully
source_basis: The system shall allow a manager to assign an employee to a department.

warnings: TC_REQ_1_002: The test case invents unsupported behavior, such as an invalid department.

plans.requirement_text: The system shall allow a manager to assign an employee to a department.

coverage_items.rationale: The requirement specifies a positive action, so a positive test is necessary.
source_basis: The system shall allow a manager to assign an employee to a department.

results.requirement_text: The system shall reject a customer email address that does not contain an at sign.

results.requirement_text: The system shall require the start date to be earlier than or equal to the end date before saving an event.

coverage_items.rationale: This is a basic validation requirement.

results.requirement_text: The system shall require a cancellation reason when an approved booking is cancelled.

test_cases.title: Cancellation reason required for approved booking cancellation
test_cases.objective: Verify that a cancellation reason is required when an approved booking is cancelled.

steps.action: Cancel an approved booking without providing a cancellation reason
steps.expected_result: System should prompt user to enter a cancellation reason

steps.action: Enter a cancellation reason and submit
steps.expected_result: Booking should be cancelled successfully

test_cases.expected_result: Cancellation reason is required for approved booking cancellation

traceability.coverage_item: Cancellation reason required for approved booking cancellation

source_basis: The system shall require a cancellation reason when an approved booking is cancelled.

test_cases.title: Cancellation reason not required for non-approved booking cancellation
test_cases.objective: Verify that a cancellation reason is not required when a non-approved booking is cancelled.

steps.action: Cancel a non-approved booking without providing a cancellation reason
steps.expected_result: Booking should be cancelled successfully without prompting for cancellation reason

test_cases.expected_result: Cancellation reason is not required for non-approved booking cancellation

traceability.coverage_item: Cancellation reason required for approved booking cancellation

source_basis: The system shall require a cancellation reason when an approved booking is cancelled.

warnings: Reviewer unavailable because Groq-only provider was blocked by governor

plans.requirement_text: The system shall require a cancellation reason when an approved booking is cancelled.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Cancellation reason required for approved booking cancellation
coverage_items.rationale: To ensure that the system enforces the cancellation reason requirement for approved bookings.
source_basis: The system shall require a cancellation reason when an approved booking is cancelled.
